testcase.name: test_calibration_status_unauthenticated
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration38_titan_glass.py:89: in test_calibration_status_unauthenticated assert response.status_code == 401 E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_register_endpoint_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Register endpoint should exist assert 404 != 404 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration38_titan_glass.py:120: in test_register_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code != 404, "Register endpoint should exist" E AssertionError: Register endpoint should exist E assert 404 != 404 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
